habitat: Western Ghats of India and Sri Lanka; major production also in Guatemala.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary spice; traditional digestive aromatic in Ayurveda and Middle Eastern coffee.
traditionalUsesDe: Küchengewürz; traditionell verdauungsförderndes Aroma in Ayurveda und arabischem Kaffee.
preparation: Whole or ground seeds in food and chai; occasional digestive tea.
cautions: Food amounts safe for most people. Concentrated oil not for casual internal use.
historicalNotes: One of the world’s most valuable spices by weight historically.
habitatDe: Western Ghats von Indien und Sri Lanka; Hauptanbau also in Guatemala.
preparationDe: Whole oder ground Samen in food und chai; occasional verdauungsbezogen Tee.
cautionsDe: Nahrungsmengen safe für most Personen. Concentrated Öl not für casual innere Anwendung.
historicalNotesDe: One von die world’s most valuable spices by weight historically.
